productDisplayName: Nike Men Black Media Polo T-shirt
description: Composition Black polo T-shirt for men made of 100% polyester, has short sleeves, chest placket, vented hem and nike tag on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Get casual with the utmost comfort in this authentic T-shirt from nike. The polyester fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable during fun times with friends, while the brand logo adds style. Pair this tee with your favourite denims and sports shoes.
